Username must be 3-16 characters!: Caithfidh 3-16 carachtar a bheith san ainm úsáideora!
Password must contain at least one upper: Ní mór litir chás uachtair amháin ar a laghad a bheith sa phasfhocal!
● At least 1 Lowercase Letter: ● Ar a laghad 1 Litir Cás Íochtarach
Password must be 8-16 characters!: Caithfidh pasfhocal a bheith idir 8-16 carachtar!
Password must contain at least one symbo: Caithfidh siombail amháin ar a laghad a bheith sa phasfhocal!
● Username Length Must Be Between 3-16: ● Ní mór Fad an Ainm Úsáideora a bheith Idir 3-16
● Password Length Must Be Between 8-16: ● Caithfidh Fad an Phasfhocail A Bheith Idir 8-16
Already have an account?: An bhfuil cuntas agat cheana féin?
Password must contain at least one lower: Ní mór litir bheag amháin ar a laghad a bheith sa phasfhocal!
Password must contain at least one numbe: Ní mór uimhir amháin ar a laghad a bheith sa phasfhocal!
